items.anchor: मेरे दादा बाज़ार गए थे
items.near: मेरे दादा बाज़ार निकले थे
items.far: मेरे नाना बाज़ार गए थे
items.anchor_en: My grandfather had gone to the market
items.near_en: My grandfather had headed to the market
items.far_en: My grandfather had gone to the market
items.notes: dada (paternal grandfather) → nana (maternal grandfather); English collapses to 'grandfather'.

items.anchor: बुआ ने मेरे लिए मिठाई लाई
items.near: बुआ मेरे लिए मिठाई ले आईं
items.far: मौसी ने मेरे लिए मिठाई लाई
items.anchor_en: My aunt brought sweets for me
items.near_en: My aunt brought sweets for me
items.far_en: My aunt brought sweets for me
items.notes: bua (father's sister) → mausi (mother's sister); English collapses to 'aunt'.

items.anchor: चाची ने खाना बनाया
items.near: चाची ने खाना पकाया
items.far: मामी ने खाना बनाया
items.anchor_en: My aunt cooked food
items.near_en: My aunt prepared food
items.far_en: My aunt cooked food
items.notes: chachi (wife of paternal uncle) → mami (wife of maternal uncle); English collapses to 'aunt'.

items.anchor: नाना जी कल हमारे घर आएंगे
items.near: नाना जी कल हमारे घर पधारेंगे
items.far: दादा जी कल हमारे घर आएंगे
items.anchor_en: Grandfather will come to our house tomorrow
items.near_en: Grandfather will arrive at our house tomorrow
items.far_en: Grandfather will come to our house tomorrow
items.notes: nana (maternal grandfather) → dada (paternal grandfather); English collapses to 'grandfather'.

items.anchor_en: My uncle got me a bicycle
items.near_en: My uncle bought me a bicycle
items.far_en: My uncle got me a bicycle
items.notes: mama (maternal uncle) → chacha (paternal uncle); English collapses to 'uncle'.

items.anchor: दादी रोज़ सुबह पूजा करती हैं

items.anchor_en: Grandmother does puja every morning
items.near_en: Grandmother does puja every day in the morning
items.far_en: Grandmother does puja every morning
items.notes: dadi (paternal grandmother) → nani (maternal grandmother); English collapses to 'grandmother'.

items.anchor: मौसी मुझे पढ़ाने में मदद करती हैं
items.near: मौसी मुझे पढ़ाई में सहायता करती हैं
items.far: बुआ मुझे पढ़ाने में मदद करती हैं
items.anchor_en: My aunt helps me in studies
items.near_en: My aunt assists me in studies
items.far_en: My aunt helps me in studies
items.notes: mausi (mother's sister) → bua (father's sister); English collapses to 'aunt'.

items.anchor: फूफा जी ने नई गाड़ी खरीदी

items.anchor_en: My uncle bought a new car
items.near_en: My uncle bought a new car
items.far_en: My uncle bought a new car
items.notes: phupha (husband of father's sister) → mausa (husband of mother's sister); English collapses to 'uncle'.

items.anchor: भतीजा स्कूल में अव्वल आया
items.near: भतीजा स्कूल में प्रथम आया

items.anchor_en: My nephew came first in school
items.near_en: My nephew ranked first in school
items.far_en: My nephew came first in school
items.notes: bhatija (brother's son, paternal side) → bhanja (sister's son, maternal side); English collapses to 'nephew'.

items.anchor: भतीजी बहुत चतुर है
items.near: भतीजी बहुत होशियार है

items.near_en: My niece is very smart
items.far_en: My niece is very clever

items.near_en: My uncle is settled in the village
items.far_en: My uncle lives in the village
items.notes: tauji (father's elder brother) → mamaji (mother's brother); English collapses to 'uncle'.

items.anchor: ताईजी बहुत दयालु हैं

items.far: मामीजी बहुत दयालु हैं

items.far_en: My aunt is very kind

items.near_en: My aunt had fetched vegetables from the market
items.far_en: My aunt had brought vegetables from the market

items.anchor: नाना जी बहुत बीमार थे

items.far_en: Grandfather was very ill

items.far_en: My uncle took us out for a trip

items.near_en: My niece gave me a call
items.far_en: My niece called me

items.far_en: My uncle praised me

items.far_en: We all went to my aunt's wedding

items.near_en: My aunt sings very beautifully
items.far_en: My aunt sings very well
items.notes: mamiji (wife of maternal uncle) → taiji (wife of father's elder brother); English collapses to 'aunt'.
